name: Trust Holdings Inc.
summary: Trust Holdings, Inc. engages in parking and real estate businesses. The company operates parking lots, plans and sells condominiums, and rents real estate properties. It also provides medical equipment, as well as consulting services to medical institutions. In addition, the company offers parking lot security services; and produces high concentration hydrogen water. Trust Holdings, Inc. was founded in 2013 and is based in Fukuoka, Japan.
